output_text: I have been in the habit of exaggerating the importance of the gift.  But it is a gift, and it is a gift of a kind that makes it possible to see in the man himself a sort of miracle.  I don’t know whether it is a gift of imagination, or of memory, or of fancy, or of invention, or of all these things together; but it is a gift that enables him to do things with words that no one else can do.
